provisions.content: It-titolu ta’ dawn ir-regolamenti hu Regolamenti dwar idDrittijiet g]all-Mapep tad-Dipartiment g]all-Gvern Lokali.

provisions.title: Titolu

Id-dritt li g]andu jit]allas lid-Dipartiment g]all-Gvern
Lokali dwar kull mappa ta’ daqs AO jew A1 g]andu jkun kif [ej:
